Build a complete Node.js implementation of a real-time auction system with bidding, countdown timers, bid validation, automatic winner determination, and WebSocket notifications.

Implement a full Node.js implementation of a server-side JavaScript sandbox that executes untrusted code in an isolated V8 context with resource limits on CPU time and memory.

Write a Go implementation of a cross-platform system agent that collects hardware metrics, running process information, network statistics, and disk I/O, exposing them via a gRPC API.
Implement a Python script that converts a monolithic Django application into microservices by analyzing model dependencies, extracting bounded contexts, and generating service scaffolding.
Build a complete React implementation of a node-based visual programming editor similar to Node-RED, where users connect nodes to build data processing pipelines with live execution.
Write a TypeScript implementation of a distributed ID generation service similar to Twitter Snowflake that produces globally unique, time-ordered, 64-bit IDs across multiple nodes.
Implement a Python class that provides a transactional messaging system where messages are sent exactly once across a distributed system using the outbox pattern and idempotent consumers.
Build a complete Go implementation of a service that continuously tails a PostgreSQL WAL stream, decodes change events, and replicates them to a Redis cache in real time.
Write a Python script that performs automated UI testing of a web application by recording user interactions, generating Playwright test scripts, and running visual regression comparisons.
Implement a full Python implementation of a database connection pooler similar to PgBouncer that multiplexes multiple client connections onto a smaller pool of server connections.
Build a complete Node.js implementation of a multi-region data synchronization service that replicates writes across geographically distributed databases with conflict detection.
Write a TypeScript implementation of a runtime type checking library that generates validators from TypeScript type definitions using the TypeScript compiler API.

Build a complete Go implementation of a fuzzing framework that generates random structured inputs based on a grammar definition and tracks code coverage to guide mutation.
Write a Python script that performs semantic versioning analysis of a Python library by comparing public APIs between versions and automatically determining the correct semver bump.
Implement a full React implementation of a spreadsheet formula debugger that shows formula parse trees, step-by-step evaluation, cell dependency highlighting, and error tracing.

Write a Go implementation of a distributed tracing propagator that instruments HTTP clients and servers to inject and extract trace context headers across service boundaries.
Implement a Python script that performs automated refactoring of Python code by detecting and eliminating code smells including long methods, feature envy, and data clumps using AST transformation.
Build a complete Node.js implementation of a real-time collaborative spreadsheet backend with cell locking, formula synchronization, conflict resolution, and change history.
Write a TypeScript implementation of an algebraic effects system for managing side effects in a pure functional style, with effect handlers for async, state, and exception effects.
Implement a Python class that provides a distributed work stealing scheduler where idle workers steal tasks from busy workers' queues to maximize CPU utilization across a cluster.
Build a complete Go implementation of a multi-tenant database proxy that routes queries to the correct tenant's database shard based on connection credentials.
Write a Python script that analyzes a large codebase for architectural violations by enforcing layered architecture rules and detecting unwanted cross-layer dependencies.
Implement a full Python implementation of a declarative infrastructure-as-code engine that reads YAML resource definitions, plans changes, and applies them to a simulated cloud environment.
Build a complete React implementation of a real-time monitoring dashboard that visualizes distributed system health with service topology maps, error rate graphs, and alert management.
Write a TypeScript implementation of a type-safe event sourcing library with strongly typed events, projections, snapshots, and a replay mechanism for rebuilding aggregate state.
Implement a Python class that provides a content-addressable storage system using SHA-256 hashes as keys, with deduplication, chunking of large files, and garbage collection.
Build a complete Go implementation of a distributed job queue with priority scheduling, job dependencies, progress tracking, and automatic requeuing of jobs from crashed workers.
Write a Python script that performs automated data quality checks on a data warehouse by profiling column distributions, detecting schema drift, and alerting on anomalies.
Implement a full Node.js implementation of a streaming data transformation pipeline with backpressure, fan-out to multiple sinks, error isolation, and metrics collection per stage.
Build a complete Python implementation of a compile-time expression evaluator using Python metaclasses that folds constant expressions during class definition.

Implement a Python class that simulates a distributed Bloom filter spread across multiple nodes, with membership queries routed to all nodes and results merged.
